justification.what: Google Workspace Business Plus subscription for boofire.ai domain
justification.why: Professional email (tuong@boofire.ai) and productivity suite for AnAn's Store LLC / boofire.ai business operations
justification.how_helps: Enables custom domain email, Google Drive, Calendar, Meet for business communications and collaboration
justification.expected_return: Professional business identity, customer-facing email, document management. 14-day free trial, then $19.80/mo (25% off for 3 months, then $26.40/mo)
